instruction:
Let 400 shells be fired independently at a target, with a known ground hit rate of 0.2 for each shell. Please use the central limit theorem to calculate, what is the probability of hitting 60 to 100?

Options:
A. 0.5432
B. 0.9876
C. 0.7654
D. 0.4321
E. 0.9999
F. 0.6543
G. 0.2198
H. 0.3219
I. 0.8765
J. 0.1987
